path: Problem: Find the first row where multiple column criteria are simultaneously met and return a value from another column in that same row
Action: Use INDEX to return from a result range and MATCH to locate the first row where a boolean product of criteria equals 1 (array criteria match)

Observation: Multiplying logical tests coerces TRUE/FALSE to 1/0, so MATCH(1, ...) returns the first row where all criteria are TRUE; optional text coercion (e.g., &"") resolves number-vs-text mismatches
